source_item.title: Amul flaunts Argentina and Spain sponsorships in World Cup final print ad

slide1_hook.label: Amul Sponsors **Both World Cup Finalists**
slide1_hook.subhead: One Indian brand. Two sides of the final.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: Amul's football bet **started in 2022**
slide2_backstory.body: Amul signed with Argentina in 2022, becoming the first Indian regional sponsor in Argentine football history. This year it added Spain too, its first-ever tie-up with La Roja.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: A full-page ad **nobody else could run**
slide3_news.body: With Spain vs Argentina as the World Cup 2026 final, Amul took out a full-page ad in Times of India as the official regional sponsor of both teams. No other brand could say that.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: Big **brand signal** for Indian companies
bullets: Indian brand on the world's biggest stage
Wins either way, no matter who lifts the trophy
Shows Indian companies can play global sports marketing

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: Is Amul **smart or lucky** to back both finalists?
slide5_engage.cta: Follow for more Indian business stories that matter.
